description: You are a mechanical engineer at an HVAC retrofit firm. The owner of the 4StoreyBuilding has approved a capital improvement project to replace all rooftop units (RTUs) on the top floor (T.*) with high-efficiency units. Update all Top Floor (T.*) packaged single-zone (PSZ) HVAC systems in the eQUEST model with a Cooling Energy Input Ratio (COOLING-EIR) of 0.28571, a Furnace Heat Input Ratio (FURNACE-HIR) of 1.11111, and a Supply fan efficiency (SUPPLY-EFF) of 0.65. Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation to compute predicted energy savings and save the project.
